comment: Typecheck-only config (tsc --noEmit). The published build is produced by tsup (see tsup.config.ts), which compiles independently and emits its own .d.ts, so tsc never emits here. rootDir/outDir are intentionally omitted: the path mapping below resolves '@othmanadi/loophole-core' to core SOURCE for typechecking, and those files live outside this package, which a rootDir would reject.
